sentences.arabic: ارْتَفَعَتْ أَسْعَارُ المَوَادِّ الغِذَائِيَّةِ فِي الأَسْوَاقِ المَحَلِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Cijene prehrambenih proizvoda u lokalnim marketima su porasle.
sentences.translationEn: Food prices have risen in local markets.

sentences.arabic: تَجِدُ العَائِلَاتُ صُعُوبَةً فِي شِرَاءِ كُلِّ مَا تَحْتَاجُ إِلَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Porodice teško kupuju sve što im je potrebno.
sentences.translationEn: Families are finding it difficult to buy everything they need.

sentences.arabic: تَقُومُ الحُكُومَةُ بِدِرَاسَةِ الوَضْعِ الِاقْتِصَادِيِّ حَالِيًّا.
sentences.translationEn: The government is currently studying the economic situation.

sentences.arabic: يُحَاوِلُ التُّجَّارُ تَقْدِيمَ عُرُوضٍ لِجَذْبِ الزَّبَائِنِ.
sentences.translation: Trgovci pokušavaju ponuditi akcije kako bi privukli kupce.
sentences.translationEn: Merchants are trying to offer deals to attract customers.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَنَّى الجَمِيعُ أَنْ تَنْخَفِضَ الأَسْعَارُ فِي الشَّهْرِ القَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Svi se nadaju da će cijene pasti sljedećeg mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone hopes that prices will decrease next month.
